Package com.shaft.capture.generate

package com.shaft.capture.generate
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.shaft.capture.generate.api
     
  • Class
    Description
    AssertionCatalog
    Deterministic, fixed assertion catalogs offered by the recorder overlay's single assertion entry point.
    AssertionCatalog.Entry
    One deterministic assertion catalog choice.
    CaptureControlFlowPreview
    Deterministic control-flow preview reviewed before applying generated guards.
    CaptureEnrichmentPreview
    Reviewable, fingerprinted AI proposal that is never applied implicitly.
    CaptureEnrichmentPreview.AssertionSuggestion
    Additional assertion bound to captured element state.
    CaptureEnrichmentPreview.Proposal
    Optional source naming and assertion suggestions.
    CaptureEnrichmentService
    Produces schema-validated AI naming and assertion previews from sanitized Capture metadata.
    CaptureGenerationReport
    Deterministic generation, locator-selection, compilation, and replay report.
    CaptureGenerationReport.ControlFlowKind
    Deterministic control-flow suggestion kind.
    CaptureGenerationReport.ControlFlowSuggestion
    One deterministic control-flow suggestion.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Enrichment
    Optional AI enrichment state.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Enrichment.EnrichmentStatus
    Enrichment status.
    CaptureGenerationReport.LocatorDecision
    One explainable locator choice.
    CaptureGenerationReport.OpenApiCoverage
    Deterministic OpenAPI coverage cross-report (see OpenApiCoverageReporter in com.shaft.capture.generate.api.internal, which this record mirrors so the report can live in this module without an API-codegen-specific dependency).
    CaptureGenerationReport.Status
    Generation status.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Validation
    Compile or replay result.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Validation.ValidationStatus
    Validation status.
    CaptureGenerationRequest
    Immutable options for converting a persisted Capture session into a SHAFT TestNG test.
    CaptureGenerationRequest.ControlFlowMode
    Deterministic control-flow suggestion lifecycle.
    CaptureGenerationRequest.EnrichmentMode
    AI enrichment lifecycle.
    CaptureGenerationResult
    Generated artifact paths and their deterministic report.
    CaptureGenerator
    Deterministic pipeline that validates, renders, compiles, replays, and reports generated SHAFT tests.
    CaptureGenerator.CodegenBackend
    SHAFT GUI backend used by generated capture replay code.
    CaptureReview
    Deterministic review of generated Capture output.
    CaptureReviewFinding
    One deterministic generated-code review finding.
    CaptureTargetInsertionPlan
    Focused record-at-target insertion snippets derived from generated Capture source.
    CaptureTargetInsertionPlanner
    Builds focused snippets for inserting Capture-generated actions into an existing source target.
    CodegenFeatureCatalog
    Current Playwright codegen feature inventory and SHAFT Capture mapping.
    CodegenFeatureCatalog.Feature
    One Playwright codegen feature and its SHAFT mapping.
    GeneratedTestValidator
    Compiles generated Java and optionally replays it in an isolated TestNG process.
    LocatorRanker
    Deterministically ranks captured locator evidence with explainable scoring.
    LocatorRanker.LocatorSelection
    Ranked selection and fallback candidates.
    LocatorRanker.ScoredLocator
    One scored candidate.
